name: albaik-mobile-automation
description: Albaik Mobile App BDD Automation Framework

scripts.test:web: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:mobile:dev: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=mobile ENV=dev wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:mobile:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=mobile ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:mobile:prod: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=mobile ENV=prod wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:chrome:dev: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome ENV=dev wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:chrome:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:chrome:prod: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome ENV=prod wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:dev: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=firefox ENV=dev wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=firefox ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:firefox:prod: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=firefox ENV=prod wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:dev: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=edge ENV=dev wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=edge ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:edge:prod: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=edge ENV=prod wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:dual-mobile:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=dual-mobile ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:full-delivery:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=full-delivery ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression @delivery
scripts.test:cross-platform:dev: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=cross-platform ENV=dev wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:cross-platform:staging: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=cross-platform ENV=staging wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:cross-platform:prod: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=cross-platform ENV=prod wdio run wdio.config.ts
scripts.test:web:tag: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome wdio run wdio.config.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression
scripts.test:web:chrome:tag: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=chrome wdio run wdio.config.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression
scripts.test:web:firefox:tag: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=firefox wdio run wdio.config.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression
scripts.test:web:edge:tag: cross-env TEST_PLATFORM=web BROWSER=edge wdio run wdio.config.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.report:zip: npm run allure:generate && npm run report:cucumber:generate && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path allure-report -DestinationPath allure-report.zip -Force" && echo Zipped to allure-report.zip
